Name: PE34

Name: PE36

Name: LipX
Comments: PD instead of PE. YxxxD/E present. Phyre2 predicts a Helix-turn-helix --> A clear PE

Name: PE8

Name: PE2

Name: PE26

Name: PPE50
Comments: Likely pseudogene

Name: PPE28
Comments: Classified as MPTR by Gey van Pittius et al. 2006. However, no MPTR repeats or PF01469 domain is detected. Potein contains two SVP sequences, but no PF12484 domain. PF08237 motif was proposed by adlinda and guruprassad and may be hydrolase domain.

Name: PPE42
Comments: GXGNxG domain present, no SVP present. PF08237 motif was proposed by adlinda and guruprassad and may be hydrolase domain.

Name: PPE52
Comments: Only one GxGNxG motif

Name: PPE63
Comments: Contains WxG motif. No PPE, but SPE motif. C-terminus does not contain MPTR or SVP motif. Not analysed by phylogeny Gey van Pittius et al. 2006. BLAST search of PPE-domain results in PPE28 and PPE21 (PPE-MPTR) as closest hits. PF08237 motif was proposed by adlinda and guruprassad and may be hydrolase domain.
